column1: [Device] Support 'last updated' timestamp when in ListBiometricsMeasurements
column28:
h1. Background

[ListBiometricsMeasurementsRequest|https://github.com/verily-src/verily1/blob/f0898f24a36623570fb1b2cae93f5a059121c9d6/device/healthdata/api/v1/biometrics-measurements.proto#L99C9-L99C42] currently does not support limiting the set of the returned results. App BFF is fetching all the [blood pressure data|https://github.com/verily-src/verily1/blob/7339230aa23f6da9001a5e15c8917cbae1be76bf/verily-me/app/bff/internal/translator/healthdata.go#L22] and the mobile client dedupes the data before persisting them in a local DB. There isn’t a lot of BP data, so for the time being, fetch all data is ok.

But as part of [https://verily.atlassian.net/browse/ONEVERILY-93896|https://verily.atlassian.net/browse/ONEVERILY-93896|smart-link] , blood glucose is being added to [ListBiometricsMeasurements|https://github.com/verily-src/verily1/blob/f0898f24a36623570fb1b2cae93f5a059121c9d6/device/healthdata/api/v1/healthdata_service.proto#L39] and eventually CGM data. Fetching all the data on every request will be inefficient for mobile clients.

h1. Proposal solution

This ticket is to add a filtering capability to [ListBiometricsMeasurements|https://github.com/verily-src/verily1/blob/f0898f24a36623570fb1b2cae93f5a059121c9d6/device/healthdata/api/v1/healthdata_service.proto#L39] to allow fetching a subset of data based on a “last updated time”. Device system should return only the set of data that have been updated in FHIR based on the timestamp specified in the request. If a timestamp is not specified, Device should return all the data.

More details in the [App’s Blood Glucose design doc|https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Jy8bhHv37Hx3JrXLDkuXQSieYWkxNIKfpVzRnh5Vb_M/edit?tab=t.0#heading=h.ao2qa0ne8ag3].
